name: io.qent.broxy/chroma-mcp
title: ChromaDB
description: Vector database for embeddings storage, similarity search, and retrieval workflows.

environmentVariables.name: CHROMA_CLIENT_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Client type: ephemeral, persistent, cloud, or http.

environmentVariables.name: CHROMA_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host for self-hosted Chroma HTTP client.

environmentVariables.name: CHROMA_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port for self-hosted Chroma HTTP client.

environmentVariables.name: CHROMA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for Chroma Cloud or configured auth.

environmentVariables.name: CHROMA_CUSTOM_AUTH_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: Custom auth credentials for HTTP client.

environmentVariables.name: CHROMA_DOTENV_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional path to .env file used by chroma-mcp.
